title: wolfhsm key.rs: KeyId newtype and key operation helpers
description: Create wolfhsm/src/key.rs. KeyId(u16) newtype wrapping whKeyId. Client methods: key_evict(id: KeyId), key_commit(id: KeyId), key_erase(id: KeyId), key_revoke(id: KeyId), key_cache(data: &[u8], label: &[u8]) -> Result<KeyId, WolfHsmError> (calls wh_Client_KeyCache with WH_KEYID_ERASED to let server assign ID; label truncated to 24 bytes). All call through error::check(). Expose KeyId with From<u16> and into/from conversions. In lib.rs: pub mod key;
